rationale: The citing paper is a methodological econometrics contribution on Gaussian-copula estimation for fixed-effects panel endogeneity, whereas the cited paper is primarily an empirical TV advertising-cues effectiveness study using a different modeling framework (and IV for price endogeneity). The only linkage evidence is one DOI-level reference match with no in-text context or reference string details, so there is insufficient evidence to confidently classify it as purely incidental or clearly substantive.
